text.title: On-Call Rotation Bootstrap Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.when: team_size between 5 and 7 AND external_retainer == true

branch.question: off-hours pages per engineer per week?

branch.conclusion: halt onboarding; tune alerts before opening rotation

example.note: Team size and SLA shape? → matches branch "team_size < 5" → conclusion ref=r3-two-tier-rotation-default
